title: Department Colloquium Series - EECS at Berkeley
content: Department Colloquium Series - EECS at Berkeley Department Colloquium Series Spring 2026 Dedicated to hosting presentations at the intersection of Electrical Engineering and Computer Science, the EECS Colloquium offers a mix of short talks by faculty describing their latest research results as well as internationally distinguished speakers. It provides an opportunity for an exchange of ideas between our department's community and the outside world. Wednesdays 4:00-5:00 PM, HP Auditorium, 306 Soda Hall (unless otherwise noted) Light refreshments served at 3:30 pm Subscribe to the eecs-announce mailing list through the web interface or via email so you can be apprised of upcoming talks. Talk recordings will become available four business days after each session. Jon Kleinberg Formal Models of Language Generation April 22, 2026 YouTube Webinar Eli Yablonovitch EECS Colloquium | What I Wish I Had Known, as I Searched for the First 3d Photonic Bandgap September 12, 2025 YouTube Webinar David Tse Realizing Nakamoto's Dream: One-Time Signatures, Garbled Circuits and Zero-Knowledge Proofs September 17, 2025 YouTube Webinar Serina Chang Inferring and simulating human behaviors for societal decision-making September 24, 2025 YouTube Webinar Dina Katabi Beyond Wearables: The Rise of Invisible AI-Powered Health Tech! October 1, 2025 YouTube Webinar Krysta Svore Why Quantum, Why Now: The Case for Better Qubits and Better Data October 15, 2025 @ 12:00 pm Simons Institute Main Auditorium YouTube Webinar Vahid Vahedi Engineering the future of semiconductors with atomic precision and AI October 22, 2025 YouTube Webinar Ali Hajimiri The Power of Working in Concert October 29, 2025 YouTube Webinar Wes Holliday Back and Forth Between Computing and Social Choice November 5, 2025 YouTube Webinar Meredith Morris HCI for AGI November 12, 2025 International House Maneesh Agrawala Making is Decision Making November 19, 2025 YouTube Webinar Bill Dally Trends in Deep Learning Hardware December 3, 2025 YouTube Webinar Ece Kamar Navigating the AI Horizon: Promises, Perils, and the Power of Collaboration December 10, 2025 YouTube Webinar Research Department Colloquium Series EECS Department Colloquium Series Archive Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS) Archive
